message:
fix(btree): add missing foldhash dependency to Cargo.toml

swiss_index.rs uses foldhash::fast::FixedState but the dependency
was not declared in the btree crate's Cargo.toml. This caused
compilation failures when consuming frankensqlite via git rev.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
